# QUADPACK sources

The `dqags`, `dqagse`, `dqelg`, `dqk21`, and `dqpsrt` routines were fetched
from Netlib QUADPACK (`https://netlib.org/quadpack/`) for the optional SKATO
integration comparison path.

`d1mach.f` and `xerror.f` are minimal local compatibility shims needed by these
legacy routines.
